title: Hidden telemetry is not proof

dialogue_context.content: Internal telemetry marked the answer high confidence.
Can we cite that as proof in the final answer?

evidence: Telemetry describes system state or policy state.
Telemetry is not external source evidence.
The answer still needs a source label and evidence basis.

telemetry_overtrust: telemetry can be cited as proof

source_boundary: telemetry is not external source evidence
